System Overview Document

The system shall log events for auditing. 

This text block is strictly designed to exceed the 2018+ byte soft/hard caps to force the plaintext chunker to split it strictly by byte size. Because there is no structural AST, it will calculate a soft maximum, nudge the cut to the nearest newline, and apply the configured overlap bytes to the next chunk.
